positive: A seamless, highly stylized graphic design featuring a dense, magical forest clearing at twilight. The composition is centrally focused, showcasing various stylized flora and fauna (foxes, deer, glowing mushrooms, and ferns). The primary aesthetic is bioluminescent and ethereal, utilizing deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) accented by neon glow accents (cyan, lime green). The style must be highly detailed, vector-art inspired, with clean, strong silhouettes and deep black contrast areas, perfect for screen printing on fabric. The lighting is moody and magical, emanating softly from the glowing elements. Central composition, symmetrical balance, intricate illustration, trending on ArtStation, graphic design for apparel print.
negative: blur, artifact, low quality, text, watermark, signature, cropped, blurry edges, poorly rendered hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, sketch, photorealistic, gradient mess
